concept: Still Light: A hyper-stylised exploration of 22k gold beaded construction earrings, emphasizing their intricate craftsmanship and luxurious warmth through controlled, directional light and deliberate, slow camera movements.

style.palette: deep obsidian black with warm amber highlights
style.lighting: single soft rim light from upper-left, controlled specular on metal, clean shadow falloff
style.mood: quiet, patient, expensive; the stillness of an empty gallery
style.environment: abstract matte black surface with faint warm atmospheric haze and slow-drifting dust motes
style.grade: high-contrast cinematic, subtle film grain, warm black point

shots.intent: To capture the luxurious texture and intricate craftsmanship of the gold beading at an extreme level of detail.
shots.scene_description: A single 22k gold beaded earring fills the frame, bathed in a warm, directional key light that creates delicate glints and soft shadows across its tightly packed spherical elements, emerging from deep, velvety darkness.
shots.frame_prompt: extreme macro close-up of the refactor smoke test, 22k gold beaded construction. A single 22k gold beaded earring fills the frame, bathed in a warm, directional key light that creates delicate glints and soft shadows across its tightly packed spherical elements, emerging from deep, velvety darkness. Environment: abstract matte black surface with faint warm atmospheric haze and slow-drifting dust motes. Lighting: single soft rim light from upper-left, controlled specular on metal, clean shadow falloff. Palette: deep obsidian black with warm amber highlights. Mood: quiet, patient, expensive; the stillness of an empty gallery. Grade: high-contrast cinematic, subtle film grain, warm black point. Composition hint: wide 16:9 cinematic composition, room for atmosphere around the subject, three-quarter view from the right, prepared for a leftward orbit. Photorealistic CGI render, 35mm equivalent, high detail on metal and stones, crisp specular highlights, no text, no watermark, no human subject.
shots.motion_prompt: slow smooth arc of the camera orbiting to the left around the product. The product (refactor smoke test) remains in frame and in focus throughout. Subtle particle and light movement is welcome; no character appears; no cuts; consistent lighting and colour grade across the clip.

shots.intent: To emphasize the elegant, organic form of the earring and how light interacts with its unique shape.
shots.scene_description: One 22k gold beaded earring stands gracefully, its unique, tapered shape beautifully sculpted by a warm, focused light that highlights the individual dangling gold beads at its base, set against an expanse of rich, dark fabric.
shots.frame_prompt: close-up product shot of the refactor smoke test, 22k gold beaded construction. One 22k gold beaded earring stands gracefully, its unique, tapered shape beautifully sculpted by a warm, focused light that highlights the individual dangling gold beads at its base, set against an expanse of rich, dark fabric. Environment: abstract matte black surface with faint warm atmospheric haze and slow-drifting dust motes. Lighting: single soft rim light from upper-left, controlled specular on metal, clean shadow falloff. Palette: deep obsidian black with warm amber highlights. Mood: quiet, patient, expensive; the stillness of an empty gallery. Grade: high-contrast cinematic, subtle film grain, warm black point. Composition hint: wide 16:9 cinematic composition, room for atmosphere around the subject, wider composition with negative space, product centred. Photorealistic CGI render, 35mm equivalent, high detail on metal and stones, crisp specular highlights, no text, no watermark, no human subject.
shots.motion_prompt: slow cinematic dolly-in toward the product; the frame tightens continuously. The product (refactor smoke test) remains in frame and in focus throughout. Subtle particle and light movement is welcome; no character appears; no cuts; consistent lighting and colour grade across the clip.

shots.intent: To present the complete pair of earrings with a sense of quiet grandeur, showcasing their collective presence and refined allure.
shots.scene_description: Both 22k gold beaded earrings are displayed side-by-side on a polished, obsidian-like surface, reflecting the warm, soft light that defines their forms and casts long, subtle shadows into the surrounding luxurious void.
shots.frame_prompt: medium product shot with environment of the refactor smoke test, 22k gold beaded construction. Both 22k gold beaded earrings are displayed side-by-side on a polished, obsidian-like surface, reflecting the warm, soft light that defines their forms and casts long, subtle shadows into the surrounding luxurious void. Environment: abstract matte black surface with faint warm atmospheric haze and slow-drifting dust motes. Lighting: single soft rim light from upper-left, controlled specular on metal, clean shadow falloff. Palette: deep obsidian black with warm amber highlights. Mood: quiet, patient, expensive; the stillness of an empty gallery. Grade: high-contrast cinematic, subtle film grain, warm black point. Composition hint: wide 16:9 cinematic composition, room for atmosphere around the subject, low angle, product slightly below camera. Photorealistic CGI render, 35mm equivalent, high detail on metal and stones, crisp specular highlights, no text, no watermark, no human subject.
shots.motion_prompt: camera gently cranes upward while keeping the product centred. The product (refactor smoke test) remains in frame and in focus throughout. Subtle particle and light movement is welcome; no character appears; no cuts; consistent lighting and colour grade across the clip.
